scripts.lint:php: WP_ENV_HOME=./.wp-env-home wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/stampy composer lint
scripts.analyse:php: WP_ENV_HOME=./.wp-env-home wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/stampy composer analyse
scripts.test:unit:php: WP_ENV_HOME=./.wp-env-home wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/stampy composer test:unit
scripts.test:integration:php: WP_ENV_HOME=./.wp-env-home wp-env run tests-cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/stampy composer test:integration
scripts.validate:fast: npm-run-all --continue-on-error lint:js lint:css type-check test:unit:js lint:php analyse:php test:unit:php
scripts.validate: npm-run-all env:start && npm-run-all --continue-on-error validate:fast && npm run validate:docker
